ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the route */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the route */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Network protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hops" (
  "hop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the hop belongs to */,
  "hop_number" INTEGER /* Hop number in the route */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the hop */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the hop */,
  "hop_type" TEXT /* Type of hop (e.g., router, switch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "hop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hop the location belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the hop is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hop is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the hop is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_hop_id FOREIGN KEY ("hop_id") REFERENCES hops ("hop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "hop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hop the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., latency, packet_loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_hop_id FOREIGN KEY ("hop_id") REFERENCES hops ("hop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., fiber-optic, satellite) */,
  "network_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the data belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., latency, packet_loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the integration belongs to */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "integration_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view_networks, edit_networks) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the hierarchy belongs to */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent node in the hierarchy */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child node in the hierarchy */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the hierarchy (e.g., 1 for top-level, 2 for second-level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
